headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Generac Holdings, Raises Price Target to $285
summary: Barclays  analyst Christine Cho   maintains Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $228 to $285.
